lines.gurmukhi: ਓਥੈ ਤੇਰੀ ਰਖ ਅਗਨੀ ਉਦਰ ਮਾਹਿ ॥
lines.translit: othai teree rakh aganee udar maeh |
lines.english: There, in the fire of the mother's womb, You protected us.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੁਣਿ ਕੈ ਜਮ ਕੇ ਦੂਤ ਨਾਇ ਤੇਰੈ ਛਡਿ ਜਾਹਿ ॥
lines.translit: sun kai jam ke doot naae terai chhadd jaeh |
lines.english: Hearing Your Name, the Messenger of Death runs away.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਿਥੈ ਤੂ ਸਮਰਥੁ ਜਿਥੈ ਕੋਇ ਨਾਹਿ ॥
lines.translit: tithai too samarath jithai koe naeh |
lines.english: Where You are, Almighty Lord, there is no one else.

lines.gurmukhi: ਭਉਜਲੁ ਬਿਖਮੁ ਅਸਗਾਹੁ ਗੁਰਸਬਦੀ ਪਾਰਿ ਪਾਹਿ ॥
lines.translit: bhaujal bikham asagaahu gurasabadee paar paeh |
lines.english: The terrifying, treacherous, impassible world-ocean is crossed over, through the Word of the Guru's Shabad.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਨ ਕਉ ਲਗੀ ਪਿਆਸ ਅੰਮ੍ਰਿਤੁ ਸੇਇ ਖਾਹਿ ॥
lines.translit: jin kau lagee piaas amrit see khaeh |
lines.english: Those who feel thirst for You, take in Your Ambrosial Nectar.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਲਿ ਮਹਿ ਏਹੋ ਪੁੰਨੁ ਗੁਣ ਗੋਵਿੰਦ ਗਾਹਿ ॥
lines.translit: kal meh eho pun gun govind gaeh |
lines.english: This is the only act of goodness in this Dark Age of Kali Yuga, to sing the Glorious Praises of the Lord of the Universe.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਭਸੈ ਨੋ ਕਿਰਪਾਲੁ ਸਮੑਾਲੇ ਸਾਹਿ ਸਾਹਿ ॥
lines.translit: sabhasai no kirapaal samaale saeh saeh |
lines.english: He is Merciful to all; He sustains us with each and every breath.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਰਥਾ ਕੋਇ ਨ ਜਾਇ ਜਿ ਆਵੈ ਤੁਧੁ ਆਹਿ ॥੯॥
lines.translit: birathaa koe na jaae ji aavai tudh aaeh |9|
lines.english: Those who come to You with love and faith are never turned away empty-handed. ||9||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਲੋਕ ਮਃ ੫ ॥
lines.translit: salok mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Salok, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਦੂਜਾ ਤਿਸੁ ਨ ਬੁਝਾਇਹੁ ਪਾਰਬ੍ਰਹਮ ਨਾਮੁ ਦੇਹੁ ਆਧਾਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: doojaa tis na bujhaaeihu paarabraham naam dehu aadhaar |
lines.english: Those whom You bless with the Support of Your Name, O Supreme Lord God, do not know any other.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਗਮੁ ਅਗੋਚਰੁ ਸਾਹਿਬੋ ਸਮਰਥੁ ਸਚੁ ਦਾਤਾਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: agam agochar saahibo samarath sach daataar |
lines.english: Inaccessible, Unfathomable Lord and Master, All-powerful True Great Giver:

lines.gurmukhi: ਕੀਮਤਿ ਕਹਣੁ ਨ ਜਾਈਐ ਅੰਤੁ ਨ ਪਾਰਾਵਾਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: keemat kehan na jaaeeai ant na paaraavaar |
lines.english: Your worth cannot be described; You have no end or limitation.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੂ ਨਿਹਚਲੁ ਨਿਰਵੈਰੁ ਸਚੁ ਸਚਾ ਤੁਧੁ ਦਰਬਾਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: too nihachal niravair sach sachaa tudh darabaar |
lines.english: You are eternal and unchanging, without vengeance and True; True is the Darbaar of Your Court.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੇ ਸੁਖੀਏ ਸਚੁ ਸਾਹ ਸੇ ਜਿਨ ਸਚਾ ਬਿਉਹਾਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: se sukhee sach saah se jin sachaa biauhaar |
lines.english: They alone find peace, and they are the true kings, whose dealings are true.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪ੍ਰਭੁ ਛੋਡਿ ਹੋਰੁ ਜਿ ਮੰਗਣਾ ਸਭੁ ਬਿਖਿਆ ਰਸ ਛਾਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: prabh chhodd hor ji manganaa sabh bikhiaa ras chhaar |
lines.english: To forsake God, and ask for something else, is all corruption and ashes.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਨਾ ਲਗੀ ਪ੍ਰੀਤਿ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਨਾਮ ਸਹਜ ਸੁਖ ਸਾਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: jinaa lagee preet prabh naam sehaj sukh saar |
lines.english: Those who are in love with God's Name, intuitively enjoy the essence of peace.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਇਕੁ ਆਰਾਧੇ ਸੰਤਨ ਰੇਣਾਰੁ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: naanak ik aaraadhe santan renaar |1|
lines.english: Nanak worships and adores the One Lord; he seeks the dust of the Saints. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਨਦ ਸੂਖ ਬਿਸ੍ਰਾਮ ਨਿਤ ਹਰਿ ਕਾ ਕੀਰਤਨੁ ਗਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: anad sookh bisraam nit har kaa keeratan gaae |
lines.english: Singing the Kirtan of the Lord's Praises, bliss, peace and rest are obtained.

lines.translit: mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਵਰ ਸਿਆਣਪ ਛਾਡਿ ਦੇਹਿ ਨਾਨਕ ਉਧਰਸਿ ਨਾਇ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: avar siaanap chhaadd dehi naanak udharas naae |2|
lines.english: Forsake other clever tricks, O Nanak; only through the Name will you be saved. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾ ਤੂ ਆਵਹਿ ਵਸਿ ਬਹੁਤੁ ਘਿਣਾਵਣੇ ॥
lines.translit: naa too aaveh vas bahut ghinaavane |
lines.english: No one can bring You under control, by despising the world.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾ ਤੂ ਆਵਹਿ ਵਸਿ ਬੇਦ ਪੜਾਵਣੇ ॥
lines.translit: naa too aaveh vas bed parraavane |
lines.english: No one can bring You under control, by studying the Vedas.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਉੜੀ ॥
lines.translit: paurree |
lines.english: Pauree:

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾ ਤੂ ਆਵਹਿ ਵਸਿ ਕਿਤੈ ਸਿਆਣਪੈ ॥
lines.translit: naa too aaveh vas kitai siaanapai |
lines.english: No one can bring You under control, by any clever tricks.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾ ਤੂ ਆਵਹਿ ਵਸਿ ਤੀਰਥਿ ਨਾਈਐ ॥
lines.translit: naa too aaveh vas teerath naaeeai |
lines.english: No one can bring You under control, by bathing at the holy places.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾ ਤੂ ਆਵਹਿ ਵਸਿ ਧਰਤੀ ਧਾਈਐ ॥
lines.translit: naa too aaveh vas dharatee dhaaeeai |
lines.english: No one can bring You under control, by wandering all over the world.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੂ ਭਗਤਾ ਕੈ ਵਸਿ ਭਗਤਾ ਤਾਣੁ ਤੇਰਾ ॥੧੦॥
lines.translit: too bhagataa kai vas bhagataa taan teraa |10|
lines.english: You are under the control of Your devotees; You are the strength of Your devotees. ||10||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਭੁ ਕੋ ਤੇਰੈ ਵਸਿ ਅਗਮ ਅਗੋਚਰਾ ॥
lines.translit: sabh ko terai vas agam agocharaa |
lines.english: Everyone is under Your power, O inaccessible, unfathomable Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾ ਤੂ ਆਵਹਿ ਵਸਿ ਬਹੁਤਾ ਦਾਨੁ ਦੇ ॥
lines.translit: naa too aaveh vas bahutaa daan de |
lines.english: No one can bring You under control, by giving huge donations to charities.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਲੋਕ ਮਃ ੫ ॥
lines.translit: salok mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Salok, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪੇ ਵੈਦੁ ਆਪਿ ਨਾਰਾਇਣੁ ॥
lines.translit: aape vaid aap naaraaein |
lines.english: The Lord Himself is the true physician.

lines.gurmukhi: ਏਹਿ ਵੈਦ ਜੀਅ ਕਾ ਦੁਖੁ ਲਾਇਣ ॥
lines.translit: ehi vaid jeea kaa dukh laaein |
lines.english: These physicians of the world only burden the soul with pain.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਕਾ ਸਬਦੁ ਅੰਮ੍ਰਿਤ ਰਸੁ ਖਾਇਣ ॥
lines.translit: gur kaa sabad amrit ras khaaein |
lines.english: The Word of the Guru's Shabad is Ambrosial Nectar; it is so delicious to eat.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਜਿਸੁ ਮਨਿ ਵਸੈ ਤਿਸ ਕੇ ਸਭਿ ਦੂਖ ਮਿਟਾਇਣ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: naanak jis man vasai tis ke sabh dookh mittaaein |1|
lines.english: O Nanak, one whose mind is filled with this Nectar - all his pains are dispelled. ||1||

lines.translit: mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਜਿਸ ਨੋ ਹੋਵੈ ਦਾਤਿ ॥
lines.translit: naanak jis no hovai daat |
lines.english: O Nanak, he alone does so, who is blessed.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹੁਕਮੇ ਨਾਮੁ ਜਪੈ ਦਿਨੁ ਰਾਤਿ ॥
lines.translit: hukame naam japai din raat |
lines.english: By His Hukam, they chant the Naam, the Name of the Lord, day and night.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹੁਕਮੇ ਦੁਖੁ ਸੁਖੁ ਸਮ ਕਰਿ ਸਹੈ ॥
lines.translit: hukame dukh sukh sam kar sahai |
lines.english: By His Hukam, they endure pain and pleasure alike.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹੁਕਮਿ ਉਛਲੈ ਹੁਕਮੇ ਰਹੈ ॥
lines.translit: hukam uchhalai hukame rahai |
lines.english: By the Hukam of Lord's Command, they move about; by the Lord's Command, they remain still.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹੁਕਮੇ ਨਾਨੑਾ ਵਡਾ ਥੀਵੈ ॥
lines.translit: hukame naanaa vaddaa theevai |
lines.english: By His Hukam, they become tiny, and huge.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹੁਕਮੇ ਸੋਗ ਹਰਖ ਆਨੰਦ ॥
lines.translit: hukame sog harakh aanand |
lines.english: By His Hukam, they receive pain, happiness and bliss.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹੁਕਮਿ ਮਰੈ ਹੁਕਮੇ ਹੀ ਜੀਵੈ ॥
lines.translit: hukam marai hukame hee jeevai |
lines.english: By the Hukam of the Lord's Command, they die; by the Hukam of His Command, they live.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹੁਕਮੇ ਆਵਣੁ ਜਾਣੁ ਰਹਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: hukame aavan jaan rahaae |
lines.english: By His Hukam, coming and going in reincarnation cease,

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਜਾ ਕਉ ਭਗਤੀ ਲਾਏ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: naanak jaa kau bhagatee laae |2|
lines.english: O Nanak, when He links them to His devotional worship. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਉੜੀ ॥
lines.translit: paurree |
lines.english: Pauree:

lines.gurmukhi: ਹੁਕਮੇ ਜਪੈ ਨਿਰੋਧਰ ਗੁਰਮੰਤ ॥
lines.translit: hukame japai nirodhar guramant |
lines.english: By His Hukam, they chant the Guru's Mantra, which always works.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੋ ਢਾਢੀ ਧਨੁ ਧੰਨੁ ਜਿਸੁ ਲੋੜੇ ਨਿਰੰਕਾਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: so dtaadtee dhan dhan jis lorre nirankaar |
lines.english: Blessed, blessed is that musician, for whom the Formless Lord Himself longs.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਉ ਤਿਸੁ ਢਾਢੀ ਕੁਰਬਾਣੁ ਜਿ ਤੇਰਾ ਸੇਵਦਾਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: hau tis dtaadtee kurabaan ji teraa sevadaar |
lines.english: I am a sacrifice to that musician who is Your servant, O Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਉ ਤਿਸੁ ਢਾਢੀ ਬਲਿਹਾਰ ਜਿ ਗਾਵੈ ਗੁਣ ਅਪਾਰ ॥
lines.translit: hau tis dtaadtee balihaar ji gaavai gun apaar |
lines.english: I am a sacrifice to that musician who sings the Glorious Praises of the Infinite Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੋ ਢਾਢੀ ਭਾਗਠੁ ਜਿਸੁ ਸਚਾ ਦੁਆਰ ਬਾਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: so dtaadtee bhaagatth jis sachaa duaar baar |
lines.english: Very fortunate is that musician who comes to the gate of the Court of the True Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਓਹੁ ਢਾਢੀ ਤੁਧੁ ਧਿਆਇ ਕਲਾਣੇ ਦਿਨੁ ਰੈਣਾਰ ॥
lines.translit: ohu dtaadtee tudh dhiaae kalaane din rainaar |
lines.english: That musician meditates on You, Lord, and praises You day and night.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਪੜੁ ਭੋਜਨੁ ਸਚੁ ਰਹਦਾ ਲਿਵੈ ਧਾਰ ॥
lines.translit: kaparr bhojan sach rahadaa livai dhaar |
lines.english: His clothes and his food are true, and he enshrines love for the Lord within.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੋ ਢਾਢੀ ਗੁਣਵੰਤੁ ਜਿਸ ਨੋ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਪਿਆਰੁ ॥੧੧॥
lines.translit: so dtaadtee gunavant jis no prabh piaar |11|
lines.english: Praiseworthy is that musician who loves God. ||11||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੰਗੈ ਅੰਮ੍ਰਿਤ ਨਾਮੁ ਨ ਆਵੈ ਕਦੇ ਹਾਰਿ ॥
lines.translit: mangai amrit naam na aavai kade haar |
lines.english: He begs for the Ambrosial Naam, the Name of the Lord, and will never be defeated.
